en: Mixing containers must be secured against falling before cleaning or maintenance, and brakes alone must not be relied upon.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 149(4)
Power supply isolation and restart prevention must be ensured during cleaning or internal work.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 149(5, 7)
Specialized training and operational familiarity must be required for concrete spraying machine operators.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 149(6)
